name: wsd-method
description: Wolff Spec Driven alpha toolkit for agent-governed private repositories.

scripts.test: npm run test:install && npm run test:install-claude && npm run test:install-brownfield && npm run test:install-git-none && npm run test:install-git-basic && npm run test:install-git-full && npm run test:install-party-mode && npm run test:install-missing-optional && npm run test:install-modules-opt-out && npm run test:install-lovable && npm run test:install-version && npm run test:install-loop && npm run test:install-codex-adherence && npm run test:install-finish-clean && npm run test:install-relatorio
scripts.test:install: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --profile generic_node_frontend >/dev/null; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" check >/dev/null; test -f "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-specify/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-design/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-tasks/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-loop/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-idea/SKILL.md" && grep -q "name: wsd-idea" "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-idea/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-concern/SKILL.md" && grep -q "name: wsd-concern" "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-concern/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-relatorio/SKILL.md" && grep -q "name: wsd-relatorio" "$tmpdir/.agents/skills/wsd-relatorio/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.codex/skills/wsd/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.codex/skills/wsd-loop/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.codex/skills/wsd-idea/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.codex/skills/wsd-concern/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.codex/skills/wsd-relatorio/SKILL.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/STATE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/PROJECT.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/ROADMAP.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS_PIPELINE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/CONCERNS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/CONCERNS_PIPELINE.md" && ! test -d "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase" && ! grep -q "+specs/codebase/" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md" && ! grep -q "{{#" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+wsd/schemas/context.schema.json" && test -x "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd-validate-context.cjs" && node "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd-validate-context.cjs" "$tmpdir/+context.json" >/dev/null && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/pre-commit" && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/commit-msg" && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/pre-push" && test -x "$tmpdir/scripts/git-hooks/pre-commit"'
scripts.test:install-claude: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools claude-code --profile generic_node_frontend >/dev/null; test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-start.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-finish.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-relatorio.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-specify.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-design.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-tasks.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/loop.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/settings.json" && test -x "$tmpdir/+wsd/hooks/pre-tool.sh" && jq -e ".hooks.PreToolUse and .hooks.PreCompact and .hooks.SessionStart and .hooks.Stop" "$tmpdir/.claude/settings.json" >/dev/null && test -f "$tmpdir/+wsd/schemas/context.schema.json" && node "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd-validate-context.cjs" "$tmpdir/+context.json" >/dev/null && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/pre-commit" && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/commit-msg" && test -x "$tmpdir/.git/hooks/pre-push" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/ROADMAP.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS_PIPELINE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/CONCERNS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/CONCERNS_PIPELINE.md" && ! grep -q "+specs/codebase/" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md" && ! grep -q "{{#" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md" && ls "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/idea-"*.md >/dev/null && ls "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/concern-"*.md >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-brownfield: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --profile generic_python_api --brownfield >/dev/null; test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/STACK.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/ARCHITECTURE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/CONVENTIONS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/STRUCTURE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/INTEGRATIONS.md" && ! test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/CONCERNS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/CONCERNS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/CONCERNS_PIPELINE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/TESTING.md" && grep -q pytest "$tmpdir/+specs/codebase/TESTING.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/ROADMAP.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+specs/project/IDEAS_PIPELINE.md" && grep -q "+specs/codebase/" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md" && ! grep -q "{{#" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md" && node "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd-validate-context.cjs" "$tmpdir/+context.json" >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-git-none: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --git-policy none >/dev/null; node -e "const c=require(process.argv[1]); if(c.git_governance.enabled!==false||c.git_governance.mode!==\"none\") process.exit(1)" "$tmpdir/+context.json"; ! test -d "$tmpdir/.github"; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git doctor >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-git-basic: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --git-policy basic >/dev/null; node -e "const c=require(process.argv[1]); if(c.git_governance.enabled!==true||c.git_governance.mode!==\"basic\") process.exit(1)" "$tmpdir/+context.json"; grep -q "Git/GitHub Governance" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md"; ! test -d "$tmpdir/.github"; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git doctor >/dev/null; touch "$tmpdir/dirty.txt"; if "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git preflight >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 1; fi'
scripts.test:install-git-full: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --git-policy full >/dev/null; node -e "const c=require(process.argv[1]); if(c.git_governance.enabled!==true||c.git_governance.mode!==\"full\") process.exit(1)" "$tmpdir/+context.json"; test -f "$tmpdir/.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/task.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/decision.md"; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git doctor >/dev/null; git -C "$tmpdir" config user.email wsd@example.invalid; git -C "$tmpdir" config user.name "WSD Test"; printf "base\n" > "$tmpdir/base.txt"; git -C "$tmpdir" add -A; git -C "$tmpdir" commit -m "chore: base" >/dev/null; git -C "$tmpdir" switch -c feat/git-governance-check >/dev/null; printf "demo\n" > "$tmpdir/demo.txt"; git -C "$tmpdir" add -A; git -C "$tmpdir" commit -m "chore: feature" >/dev/null; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" git pr-check >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-party-mode: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools claude-code --profile generic_node_frontend >/dev/null; test -f "$tmpdir/.claude/commands/wsd-party-mode.md" && test -f "$tmpdir/+wsd/party-mode/agents-wsd.csv" && test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/party-mode/agents" && test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/party-mode/steps" && test -f "$tmpdir/+wsd/party-mode/templates/PARTY_ANALYSIS.md.template" && grep -q "Party Mode" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md"; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" party status >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-missing-optional: bash -lc 'set -e; src=$(mktemp -d); tgt=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$src\" \"$tgt\"" EXIT; cp -r bin templates profiles schemas scripts party-mode "$src/"; cp package.json "$src/"; node "$src/bin/wsd-method.js" install --directory "$tgt" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --profile generic_node_frontend >/dev/null && test -f "$tgt/+specs/project/PROJECT.md" && test -f "$tgt/+wsd/bin/wsd" && ! test -d "$tgt/+wsd/docs" && ! test -d "$tgt/+wsd/examples"'
scripts.test:install-modules-opt-out: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --profile generic_node_frontend --no-docs --no-party-mode --no-examples >/dev/null; test -f "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" && test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/templates" && test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/profiles" && test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/scripts" && test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/schemas" && ! test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/docs" && ! test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/party-mode" && ! test -d "$tmpdir/+wsd/examples" && node -e "const c=require(process.argv[1]); if(c.modules.docs!==false||c.modules.party_mode!==false||c.modules.examples!==false) process.exit(1)" "$tmpdir/+wsd/config.json"'
scripts.test:install-lovable: bash -lc 'tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmpdir\"" EXIT; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$tmpdir" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools claude-code --profile lovable_tanstack_start >/dev/null; node "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd-validate-context.cjs" "$tmpdir/+context.json" >/dev/null && node -e "const c=require(process.argv[1]); if(!c.lovable_integration||c.lovable_integration.enabled!==true||c.lovable_integration.package_manager!==\"bun\"||c.lovable_integration.bot!==\"gpt-engineer-app[bot]\") process.exit(1); if(!c.permissions.forbidden_paths.includes(\"./package-lock.json\")) process.exit(2); if(!c.permissions.tool_allowlist.includes(\"bun\")) process.exit(3);" "$tmpdir/+context.json" && grep -q "^package-lock.json$" "$tmpdir/.gitignore" && grep -q "Lovable Workflow" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md" && grep -q "gpt-engineer-app\[bot\]" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md" && ! grep -q "{{#" "$tmpdir/AGENTS.md" && "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" lovable help >/dev/null && if "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" lovable doctor >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "FAIL: lovable doctor passou sem bun.lock"; exit 1; fi; touch "$tmpdir/bun.lock"; "$tmpdir/+wsd/bin/wsd" lovable doctor >/dev/null'
scripts.test:install-version: bash -lc 'tmproot=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf \"$tmproot\"" EXIT; p1="$tmproot/proj-a"; p2="$tmproot/nested/proj-b"; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$p1" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools codex --profile generic_node_frontend >/dev/null; node bin/wsd-method.js install --directory "$p2" --init-git --yes --github skip --tools claude-code --profile generic_node_frontend >/dev/null; (cd "$p1" && ./+wsd/bin/wsd version --json) | node -e "let s=\"\"; process.stdin.on(\"data\", d=>s+=d); process.stdin.on(\"end\",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s); if(r.status!==\"aligned\"||r.installed_version!==r.source_version||r.path!==\".\") process.exit(1);})"; "$p1/+wsd/bin/wsd" version --inventory --path "$tmproot" --max-depth 4 | grep -q "proj-b"; "$p1/+wsd/bin/wsd" version --json --inventory --path "$tmproot" --max-depth 4 | node -e "let s=\"\"; process.stdin.on(\"data\", d=>s+=d); process.stdin.on(\"end\",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s); if(!Array.isArray(r)||r.length!==2||!r.every(x=>x.status===\"aligned\")) process.exit(1);})"'
